articles.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier arrested over alleged war crimes, local media say - BBC
articles.description: Ben Roberts-Smith, who denies all wrongdoing, previously lost a landmark defamation case over the alleged murders.
articles.content: "We can't go to that country, we don't have access to the crime scenes We don't have photographs, site plans, measurements, the recovery of projectiles, blood spatter analysis We don't have access to… [+14 chars]
